mnemonics: Four to One is Four Data Items per Line
Eight to One is Eight Data Items per Byte
keyPoints: 4:1 represents a line of 4 bits in binary
8:1 represents a byte of 8 bits in binary
4:1 is used in binary to represent data in a line format
8:1 is used in binary to represent data in a byte format
4:1 is one of the simplest binary representations
8:1 is used in computer architecture for data storage and transfer
